text:
I am so happy your stuff exists, you absolute master of poopage!

There are moments in my life when I just start giggling at work because my brain remembered a line from any one of your masterpieces. A screaming Gotye, the "I can respawn" Trumper, Sir Mix-a-lot saying "I lah le like boys' butts and I cannot lie", "Imagine an ass drinking Dasani" or a random "we're going surfing on the surf en-gine". There have been so many times when I just burst out laughing or kept singing the abridged songs to myself. Brick by brick is just such a banger.

I know it's just sentimental overflow but damn, my life is better because I've found this channel here. This one sparks joy. Sending you my parasocial love via the internet. May you experience the same happiness I got from you!
